task_description: Add learning ability to Discord bot
initial_idea: I want my bot to have learning ability
codebase_context: Bot already has: (1) daily conversation logs memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md with rolling 2-day context + auto-summarize, (2) facts.md with user/server facts extracted via LLM after every message, (3) silent observation via WATCH_CHANNELS. facts_manager.py appends facts as bullet points indefinitely - no dedup, no versioning, no pruning. extract_facts() called 2x per mention. Key files: bot.py, llm_client.py, memory_manager.py, facts_manager.py, config.py, system_prompt.txt
